subcodes.first_line: Telegraph of your arrival in New York was received and we were immensely gladdened
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلغراف وصول به نیویورک رسید بسیار مسرور شدیم که الحمد لله سالما رسیدید و امید
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
